channel.title: Wordpress on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Wordpress on TLDRBins

item.title: Wordpress
item.description: wpscan Download wpscan wpscan --url http://10.10.11.10 -e ap,t,tt,u # You will need an api token to scan vulns wpscan --url http://10.10.11.10 -e ap,t,tt,u --api-token API_KEY
